chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8256 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.34638/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Syed Shayan Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel states that the impugned notices shall be responded to before the issuing authority and pending adjudication thereof the department may not take any further coercive action against the petitioner. Learned Assistant Attorney General has no cavil to the aforesaid. In view hereof, petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
